mapper.select:
WITH base AS ( SELECT record_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY record_date) AS rn FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT record_date FROM bookkeeping_records WHERE deleted = 0
AND is_statistics = 1
AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY record_date ) x ), grp AS ( SELECT record_date, DATEDIFF(record_date, '1970-01-01') - rn AS grp_id FROM base ), ranges AS ( SELECT MIN(record_date) AS maxContinuousStartDate, MAX(record_date) AS maxContinuousEndDate, COUNT(*) AS maxContinuousDays FROM grp GROUP BY grp_id ) SELECT * FROM ranges ORDER BY maxContinuousDays DESC LIMIT 1

WITH monthly AS ( SELECT MONTH(record_date) AS peakMonth, COUNT(*) AS peakCount FROM bookkeeping_records WHERE deleted = 0
AND is_statistics = 1
AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY YEAR(record_date), MONTH(record_date) ) SELECT * FROM monthly ORDER BY peakCount DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS missing_count FROM bookkeeping_records WHERE deleted = 0
AND is_statistics = 1
AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND DATE(record_date) != DATE(create_time)

SELECT record_date AS maxDayDate, SUM(amount) AS maxDayAmount FROM bookkeeping_records WHERE deleted = 0
AND record_category in #{item}
AND is_statistics = 1
AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY record_date ORDER BY maxDayAmount DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT MONTH(record_date) AS maxMonthName, SUM(amount) AS maxMonthAmount FROM bookkeeping_records WHERE deleted = 0
AND record_category in #{item}
AND is_statistics = 1
AND record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY MONTH(record_date) ORDER BY maxMonthAmount DESC LIMIT 1
